name: swann
description: Swann — a Discord music bot that plays via Lavalink, understands natural-language requests in text and voice (Mistral function-calling + Voxtral), detects the "Swann" wake word with Picovoice Porcupine, and ships as a Home Assistant add-on with an Ingress admin UI.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && rm -rf dist/admin/public && mkdir -p dist/admin && cp -R src/admin/public dist/admin/public
